hero.label: Artify
hero.body: Artify delivers innovative, high-quality, and sustainable construction solutions for Mongolia's built environment.

about.label: 01 — About
about.heading: Precision in every structure
about.body1: Founded in 2014, we have delivered regional, urban, and industrial developments while maintaining rigorous quality standards.
about.body2: With expertise spanning engineering, design, and project management, we provide tailored, sustainable solutions for every client.

testimonials.label: 02 — Testimonials
testimonials.heading: Trusted by industry leaders
testimonials.quote1: Artify's professional expertise and ability to deliver on time were instrumental in the success of our project.
testimonials.quote2: Quality, safety, and transparent communication are why Artify has become our long-term partner.
testimonials.quote3: Meeting a team of this caliber in the construction sector has been a major advantage for us.

blockAcademy.title: Block Academy
blockAcademy.description: A training platform combining construction education, certification, and hands-on practice.

techInvent.title: Tech Invent
techInvent.description: Explore construction technology and innovation solutions through the Tech Invent project.

customMaterials.title: Custom Materials
customMaterials.description: Construction material solutions tailored to each project and adapted to local conditions.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Ready to start your project?
contact.body: Let us help turn your construction vision into reality. Reach out to our team.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you, your message has been received.
